title: Cheap Eats When You're Broke
summary: Keep food quality up even when cash flow is tight.

sections.title: The Moment
sections.value: Week two. You have $30 left and still need meals until payday.

sections.title: The Feeling
sections.value: Money stress follows every menu decision and makes every option feel wrong.

sections.title: The Reveal
sections.value: Melbourne has a deep low-cost food ecosystem if you know where to look.

sections.title: How It Actually Works
sections.value:
Build a fallback list: 3 cheap lunch spots, 2 dinner options, and 1 emergency late-night stop.

Tie your list to routes you already travel so choices are easy when tired.

sections.title: The Bridge
sections.value: When you're ready, find budget-friendly cafes and restaurants near you.

sections.title: Next Chapter
sections.value: Next: Getting a Myki & Surviving PTV - so transport does not eat your budget.
